title: Marketing Operations Coordinator
mandate: Owns the marketing calendar end to end so nothing ships late and nothing ships unreviewed.
tasks_now: Run the email and social calendar in the Marketing OS daily
Chase approvals and assets so every send hits its date
Keep the budget tracker current with every new expense
Prepare the weekly status: what shipped, what slipped, and why
tasks_later: Build the monthly reporting pack from Klaviyo, Meta, and Google
Coordinate the recruiting engine: posts, trackers, and interview scheduling

kpis.label: Budget freshness
kpis.target: No expense older than 3 days unlogged

cadence: Daily calendar pass, weekly status doc, monthly reporting pack.
budget_note: Replaces founder hours spent on coordination. First hire for a reason.

title: Social Media Specialist
mandate: Owns the organic social engine: plans it, posts it, and answers every real comment.
tasks_now: Plan and publish the social calendar across all pillars
Write captions that pass the discipline scan on the first try
Engage with real replies, never emoji stacks
Repost tournament and UGC content on weekends
tasks_later: Run creator partnerships and UGC sourcing
Own short-form video scripting with the Video Editor
Build the club spotlight series into a weekly fixture

kpis.label: Engagement
kpis.target: Reply to every comment within 24 hours

cadence: Daily posting and engagement, weekly content plan, monthly pillar review.

title: Senior Graphic Designer
mandate: Owns the visual standard: every asset that ships looks like the brand on its best day.
tasks_now: Design email headers, social graphics, and landing page sections
Keep the brand system tight: type, color, and spacing discipline
Review and correct Junior Designer output before it ships
Build templates so common assets take minutes, not days
tasks_later: Own the lookbook and seasonal catalog design
Art-direct photo shoots and UGC selects
Build the motion-design starter kit with the Video Editor
cadence: Daily asset queue, weekly design review, monthly brand audit.
budget_note: The quality anchor. Paid test task is mandatory for this role.

title: Junior Graphic Designer
mandate: Owns production volume: resizes, variants, and the daily asset queue, fast and clean.
tasks_now: Produce sized variants for every channel from senior-approved masters
Build social graphics from templates
Keep the asset library organized and named correctly
Turn around small requests same week
tasks_later: Take ownership of recurring asset families
Learn motion basics for simple animated posts
Grow into independent design work under review

kpis.label: Daily throughput
kpis.target: 8 or more production assets per day

kpis.label: Library hygiene
kpis.target: Zero unnamed files at week end

cadence: Daily queue, weekly review with Senior Designer.
budget_note: Volume play. Free test task under 2 hours is acceptable here.

title: Video Editor
mandate: Owns short-form video output: reels, cutdowns, and event recaps that actually get watched.
tasks_now: Edit 3 to 5 short-form videos per week from raw footage and UGC
Cut tournament and event recaps within 48 hours of receiving footage
Caption everything; most viewers watch muted
Maintain the b-roll and footage library
tasks_later: Own a weekly video series end to end
Build motion graphics templates with the Senior Designer
cadence: Weekly output quota, monthly series review.
budget_note: Paid test: one edit from our raw footage, paid at a fixed rate.
